calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2009 Continued To Jan-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Carl Salciedo, #2031.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Dave Porter Truck Sales, L.L.C., David Porter or Barbara Porter.
Defaults were entered against defendants on November 4, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on November 4, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 7, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Dave Porter Truck Sales, L.C.C., David Porter and Barbara Porter as follows:

Damages/Principal - $96,943.41.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,685.12.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $590.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $108,718.53.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Continued To Dec-18-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
